sources.label: Yahoo Finance - BELIMO Holding AG (BEAN.SW) quote and news
Yahoo Finance - BEAN.SW analyst ratings and estimates (consensus Hold, ~CHF 914 target)
ad-hoc-news - Belimo early-2026 sales momentum (May trading update recap, pre-Jun 6)
TipRanks - Belimo 2025 growth on data center demand (background, not new)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's down move already repriced the crowding/valuation drag; since June 6 there is no new contract, guidance, or analyst catalyst, and today's -1.3% drift on no news does not change the latent-node setup. Rank 45 with score 68 remains fair.
verdicts.bull: Belimo actuators/valves sit in the data-center thermal chain including direct-to-chip liquid cooling loops, and Jan-Apr 2026 sales grew across regions, so the structural HVAC-for-AI demand story is intact.
verdicts.neutral: A well-known Swiss quality compounder at roughly 60x earnings with consensus Hold near CHF 914; the bottleneck exposure is real but already recognized, leaving limited residual alpha on a latency-weighted list.
verdicts.bear: Valuation leaves no room for a construction-cycle wobble or data-center capex digestion; any slowdown in HVAC retrofit or DC cooling orders compresses the multiple hard from 60x.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H1 2026 results / mid-year update quantifying data-center and liquid-cooling-adjacent order momentum.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Multiple compression from ~60x P/E if growth normalizes or data-center HVAC orders pause.
